description_long: This is a large, irregularly shaped chunk of rose quartz with a rough, unpolished surface and a predominantly pink hue. The stone displays natural fractures and uneven edges, with some areas showing a more granular texture and others appearing smoother. One side features a paper label with printed text, indicating its mineral type and origin, suggesting it may have been part of a collection or display. The coloration ranges from pale pink to deeper rose tones, with subtle white and tan inclusions visible throughout. The base of the stone is relatively flat, allowing it to rest stably on a surface, while the top and sides are more jagged and angular. The overall appearance is that of a naturally occurring mineral specimen, likely sourced from a quarry or geological site.
description: A large, rough chunk of rose quartz with a pink, granular surface and a paper label attached to one side. The stone has jagged edges, natural fractures, and a flat base for stable placement.
description_view_0: This view shows the broadest face of the stone, highlighting its pink coloration, rough texture, and a prominent tan and white area on the left edge.
description_view_1: This angle reveals the stone's angular side, with more pronounced jagged edges and a glimpse of the paper label on the far side.
description_view_2: The rear view displays the stone's longest, flattest surface, with a more uniform pink-brown color and minimal visible fractures.
description_view_3: This view focuses on the end with the paper label, showing detailed text and a mix of pink, tan, and white hues, as well as the stone's rough, broken edge.
attribute_location: urban park landscaping or decorative garden
attribute_placement: set as a standalone feature or accent stone on the ground
attribute_pattern: Subtle natural veining and mottling with irregular color patches; no artificial carvings or regular patterns.
attribute_weathering: Rough and unpolished with minor surface abrasions, indicating limited exposure to weathering; appears freshly quarried or minimally aged.
attribute_integration_with_surroundings: Contrasts with man-made surfaces but can blend with other natural stones or landscaping elements; label suggests it may be part of a curated display.
